OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Howard Brandon, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Swords to Plowshares.
Attorney, Michael S. Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Peter Guzman is present.
Attorney, Katharine E. Allen representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of JUL-20-2009 is vacated.
